steps.t: Amon Môth is located to the west and south of the Eavespires, and the cairn Erchiel mentioned is somewhere on the northern outskirts of their camp. Er…
Erchiel can be found at the Eavespires, east and north of Amon Môth, near the shoreline of Lake Evendim. You should bring the lucky stone back to Erch…
